question.label: Tradeoff process
question.name: Roadmap tradeoffs — who actually makes the call when teams disagree?
question.description: Pins down the specific decision path she cannot yet see so the manager can clarify it.

answer: A consistent partner check-in cadence would help me validate assumptions earlier.

assessment.note: Names a missing support mechanism — a consistent partner check-in cadence — which signals unresolved clarity and blocked growth; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] partner check-in cadence could be worth unpacking next session.

new_queue.label: Steadier next steps
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 7)

history.answer_excerpt: I am settling in, but I still feel like I am learning the unwritten rules in every meeting.
I want to drive alignment, but I do not want to create noise by over-communicating.
I still need a clearer picture of how roadmap tradeoffs are finalized here.
